title: Show Timeline tasks in My Week
excerpt:
Currently in My Week tasks only appear on the last day that is set in a timeline task. It would be very helpful if a task is visible on My Week from the timeline start date up to and including the timeline end date. 
The…

posts.author: Joris (Joris Nieuwint)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently in My Week tasks only appear on the last day that is set in a timeline task. It would be very helpful if a task is visible on My Week from the timeline start date up to and including the timeline end date.

The most simple example is the use of the vacations board, a three week vacation for a colleague only shows up on My Week on the last week.

The current setup means that tasks that need to be done in a certain period now only show up on the due date, not the start date.

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
This would be awesome. There is another discussion going on about this topic here Active Timeline, in My Week, for a task due at a later week & Week Column Not Populating My Week section

In our use case we work in sprints of 2 weeks and most items in our sprint boards do not have a deadline column, but should be dealt with in those two weeks. Because of this they are not popping up the the My week section. Therefore the My week section is totally not used in our company which is a shame.
